settings.heading: From Healing to Styling – Master Your Daith
settings.subheading:
From sleek minimalism to bold statement piercings, there is a fit for every individual's style. Here is a quick overview of the different types of lip piercings which also aims to help you make an informed decision when choosing to pierce your lips. These piercings often appeal to those who know exactly what they’re looking for and appreciate unique styles.

JEWELLERY: Segment Clickers, Captive Bead Rings (BCR's), Horseshoe Barbells (CBB's)

STANDARD SIZE: 16G (1.2mm) and 18G (1.0mm) Thickness & 6-10mm hoops

DOWNSIZE: 8-12mm is standard hoop diameter after healing for snug fit as the tissue is fairly thin in this area

HEALING TIME: Slightly higher on the pain level at 5-7/10 due to the cartilage tissue. You may hear a pop/crunch sound as the needle pierces through, which is totally normal!

PAIN LEVEL: Slightly higher on the pain level at 5-7/10 due to the cartilage tissue. You may hear a pop/crunch sound as the needle pierces through, which is totally normal!

AFTERCARE: Clean your piercings 2-3 a day with Saline solution and restrain from fiddling with the piercing. Avoid sleeping on the pierced side and it is best to wait until the piercing has healed before deciding to get another one on either ears.

PRO-TIP: Daith piercings can really highlight your ear, jewellery and ear stack in the most attractive way possible. Choosing even a simple, classic Daith hoop is sure to feature your ear arrangement to the next level
